title: Cookie
description: A personal, AI-native webmail client — Vue 3 app backed by a Cloudflare Worker that ingests inbound mail into Supabase Postgres, with hybrid keyword-plus-semantic search, automatic AI labeling, spam filtering, summaries, and an 'Ask Cookie' assistant over your mailbox.

title: Mobile Home Dashboard
description: A mobile-first email dashboard for fast triage with powerful search, labels, snoozing, undo send, and customizable theming.
